title: query_database
description: Query a Notion database with filters, sorts, and pagination. Supports compound filters (and/or) and multi-property sorting.

database_id.description: UUID of the Notion database to query

filter.description: Notion filter object (see Notion API filter spec). Supports property filters and compound and/or groups.

timestamp.description: Sort by timestamp instead of property

start_cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous query result
